ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (IsPickVal(StageName, "Closed Won") ||IsPickVal(StageName, "Closed Lost") ||IsPickVal(StageName, "Closed Stalled")) && (ISCHANGED(StageName)|| ISCHANGED(Use_Cases__c)) &&ISBLANK(text(Primary_Use_Case__c)) && $Profile.Name !="System Administrator" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves"
